acceptedVia: chat 2026-07-23 — explanation verified against the five source files listed as inputs
recordTitle: How tag filtering works in the skills catalog
summary: URL-derived rendering over a pure functional core: one parameter, two pure functions, one DOM sink. Verified against source at a8b0837 — every claim carries its file:line location.

decisions.rationale: Walked each claim against the code; the map and steps match what actually landed.

canonicalBody:
# Feature X-ray — tag filtering

Every render derives from the URL: parseTagFromSearch → filterByTag →
replaceChildren. The no-JS catalog is the baseline the script enhances.
Unknown tags render the accepted empty state; back/forward replay the same
single render path. Claims verified file-by-file at a8b0837.
